news.t: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of the MIG Core ETF (MIGO)

holdings.infoBox: MIGO is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vanguard S&P 500 ETF stock at 18.08%, Invesco QQQ Trust Series I at 4.88%, VanEck Semiconductor ETF at 4.36%, Broadcom at 3.98%, and Micron Technology at 3.52%.

overview.description: The MIG Core ETF (MIGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in a portfolio of equity securities of US large-cap companies, and unaffiliated ETFs with similar economic characteristics. It seeks long-term capital appreciation. MIGO was launched on Feb 23, 2026 and is issued by MIG.
